name: Feature request

## Summary

What would you like added or improved?

## Use Case

Explain the project or workflow this would support.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Prompt files
- [ ] Configuration profiles
- [ ] Shared standards
- [ ] Schemas
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Validation tools
- [ ] Documentation

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior.

## Compatibility Notes

Should this preserve v1.0.0 behavior? Are migrations needed?
